headline: HawkEye 360 Adds L3Harris Veteran As Investors Weigh Valuation Gap
summary: HawkEye 360 (NYSE:HAWK) has appointed Alex Johnson as Senior Vice President of Engineering & System Operations. Johnson joins from L3Harris Technologies, bringing experience in C4ISR, SIGINT, and multi sensor fusion solutions. This leadership change comes during HawkEye 360's early period as a public company, with growing attention on its space based signals intelligence offering. For investors watching NYSE:HAWK, this move adds a new level of technical leadership at a time when the company...

summary: OSI Systems faces a Mexico program step-down, but a record $1.9B backlog and improving cash collections could reshape the next few quarters.

headline: Can Financial Investigations Become Cognyte's Next Major Growth Engine?
summary: CGNT's fiscal Q1 2027 revenues rise 10% to $105.5M as demand grows for investigative analytics and new financial crime solutions.
